facebook.content: Hey loved ones, it's time to come together and lift our voices in praise. Our in-person worship takes place on the First Saturday of every month at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI. If you can't join us in person, don't worry - we've got you covered. Join us on Facebook Live, Mon-Fri at 8:15 AM for an Hour of Power. It's a time of worship, prayer, and connection with God and each other. Who's joining us this month?
facebook.fullPost:
Hey loved ones, it's time to come together and lift our voices in praise. Our in-person worship takes place on the First Saturday of every month at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI. If you can't join us in person, don't worry - we've got you covered. Join us on Facebook Live, Mon-Fri at 8:15 AM for an Hour of Power. It's a time of worship, prayer, and connection with God and each other. Who's joining us this month?

Join us for worship
https://increasingfaith.net/visit.html

#Faith #KingdomOfGod #Jesus

instagram.content:
"Come and experience the presence of God with us at IFM. Join us in-person on the First Saturday of every month at 12 Noon, 24301 Telegraph, Southfield, MI. Or, tune in daily online to the Hour of Power, Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live.

These are sacred spaces where we come to encounter His love, peace, and power. Don't miss it. 

Who's joining us?"
